title: HII Hosts Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Michael Gilday at Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Jan. 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced that Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Michael Gilday visited the company's Ingalls Shipbuilding division on Thursday, Jan. 26 during a trip to the Gulf Coast. While in Pascagoula, Gilday met with Ingalls leadership and toured the shipyard including amphibious assault ship Richard M. McCool Jr. (LPD 29) and guided missile destroyer Jack H. Lucas (DDG 125).

title: Huntington Ingalls: Recent Dip Provides Good Buying Opportunity
text: Huntington Ingalls is a moat-worthy shipbuilder that's produced market-beating returns for shareholders. It has a strong line of sight as the U.S. Navy seeks to ramp up and modernize its fleet.

title: Is Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Defense In An Uncertain World: Sell Lockheed Martin, Buy HII?
text: Lockheed Martin, for example through its F-35 franchise, has seen interest in its services due to the war in Ukraine and Europe's increasing emphasis on defense spending. As a result, the stock significantly outperformed the market, raising the question of whether LMT is a good candidate for a pair trade.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding Grants $100,000 in STEM Awards
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Jan. 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division awarded $100,000 in grants to 26 STEM-related initiatives from schools and educational organizations located in Mississippi and Alabama. The STEM awards are currently distributed on an annual basis and are used to further the education of science, technology, engineering and math.

title: HII Names New Executive Vice President and Chief Information Officer
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Jan. 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Chris Soong has been promoted to executive vice president and chief information officer. Soong, previously the CIO at HII's Mission Technologies division, will replace Bharat Amin, who will retire on March 31 after nearly a decade of service with the company.

title: Bear of the Day: Huntington Ingalls (HII)
text: Nuclear-powered ships and subs does not always translate to nuclear earnings trends.

title: HII to Host Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on Feb. 9
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Jan. 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) will release its fourth quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, Feb. 9 and host an earnings conference call at 9 a.m. Eastern time the same day. The call will be webcast live on HII's website: https://www.hii.com/.

title: My 6-Figure Market-Beating Dividend Growth Portfolio
text: As requested by many, I decided to dedicate an article to my personal dividend growth portfolio, consisting of more than 90% of my net worth. I start by explaining my strategy and approach, followed by a discussion of the benefits that come with dividend (growth) investment strategies.

title: Ingalls Shipbuilding Appoints Kimberly Nastasi to Vice President, Integrated Communications and Stakeholder Engagement
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Jan. 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Ingalls Shipbuilding division promoted Kimberly Nastasi to vice president of the newly formed integrated communications and stakeholder engagement department. This new department will enhance communication and engagement with key stakeholders inside and outside of the shipbuilding community.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding Awarded Advanced Planning Contract for Zumwalt-Class Ships
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Jan. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division was awarded a $10.5 million contract today for the modernization period planning of Zumwalt-class guided missile destroyers, USS Zumwalt (DDG 1000) and USS Michael Monsoor (DDG 1001).
